questions.subject: Mineral Processing
questions.stem: Bond's work index represents the energy needed to reduce a feed of:
questions.solution: Bond's law: W = 10Wi(1/√P − 1/√F) with sizes in µm; Wi corresponds to F→∞ and P=100 µm.
